name: WhatsApp
description: Send WhatsApp messages and summarize group conversations

functions.name: summarizeGroupConversation
functions.description: Summarize recent messages from a WhatsApp group
functions.output_format: Short summary of the requested group conversation.

workflows.name: send_whatsapp_message
workflows.description: Collect recipient and message, then send a WhatsApp message

required_params.name: recipient
required_params.description: Please provide recipient name or phone number.

required_params.name: message
required_params.description: Please provide the WhatsApp message text.

optional_params.name: group
optional_params.description: Optional: provide a group name if this should be sent to a group.
